word: H8055 - שָׂמַח - sâmach - saw-makh' - Cheer up

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂמח

Transliteration: śâmach

Phonetic: saw-makh'

BDB Definition:

  1. to rejoice, be glad
    1. (Qal)
      1. to rejoice
      2. to rejoice (arrogantly), exult (at)
      3. to rejoice (religiously)
    2. (Piel) to cause to rejoice, gladden, make glad
    3. (Hiphil) to cause to rejoice, gladden, make glad

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2268

Part(s) of speech: Verb
